rationale: The cited paper appears only as part of a grouped citation in the concluding section, where the authors note possible future extensions that combine aggregate and disaggregate data sources. The 2007 paper does not discuss Chintagunta and Dube (2005) in its model setup, estimation algorithm, simulations, or empirical interpretation. Because the citation serves as a general literature pointer rather than a paper-specific building block, its role is a passing mention.
